steps.title: Frame outcome and constraints
actions: Classify requirements, preferences, hypotheses, and unknowns.
Declare browser, accessibility, privacy, and performance expectations.
exit_criteria: Primary user, job, action, success signal, and hard constraints are testable.

steps.title: Model content and task structure
actions: Create a text-only page outline and primary task flow.
Define representative data and failure fixtures.
Remove sections that do not advance the outcome.
exit_criteria: The experience is understandable without styling and includes recovery paths.

steps.title: Choose and compare directions
actions: Define relevant visual axes and inventory useful signals from the subject's materials, tools, language, environment, and evidence.
Create two or three materially different direction candidates using real content and meaningful structural signals.
Score candidates with the design-direction rubric and record the decision.
exit_criteria: The selected direction serves audience and content and has repeatable signals.

steps.title: Establish resilient foundations
actions: Define semantic color, type, spacing, radius, and motion tokens.
Implement semantic document structure and responsive containers.
exit_criteria: Foundations support all selected themes, widths, and accessibility states.

steps.title: Build from contracts and complete states
actions: Implement native-first components from explicit contracts.
Exercise the component state matrix with realistic fixtures.
Keep server-client and state ownership boundaries explicit.
exit_criteria: Primary and recovery flows work with keyboard, slow data, and representative content.

steps.title: Verify, harden, and release
actions: Run completion gates and the browser risk matrix, establishing explicit user-visible readiness before browser actions and asserting each rendered outcome.
Validate metadata, privacy, performance, and localization.
Release incrementally when risk warrants and monitor defined success signals.
exit_criteria: All mandatory applicable gates pass or have an owned, expiring waiver.
